question: Line chart of inflation rate over time
response:
Here is the line chart showing inflation rate over time from 2000 to 2024.

**Key observations:**
- Inflation started around 2% in early 2000 and remained relatively stable through the mid-2000s
- There was a notable spike during the 2008 financial crisis period
- Inflation dropped significantly after 2009, reaching lows around 1-2%
- A dramatic surge occurred starting in 2021, peaking above 9% in 2022
- Inflation has been declining since the 2022 peak, returning to around 3% by early 2024

args.code:
df = _db.execute("SELECT quarter, inflation_rate FROM us_quarterly_macro_0047798b ORDER BY quarter").df()

chart = alt.Chart(df).mark_line().encode(
    x=alt.X("quarter:T", title="Quarter"),
    y=alt.Y("inflation_rate:Q", title="Inflation Rate (%)"),
    tooltip=[alt.Tooltip("quarter:T"), alt.Tooltip("inflation_rate:Q", format=".2f")]
)
chart = gs_theme(chart, "Inflation Rate Over Time")
save_artifact(chart, "Inflation Rate Over Time")

args.code:
import altair as alt

df = _db.execute("SELECT quarter, inflation_rate FROM us_quarterly_macro_0047798b ORDER BY quarter").df()

chart = alt.Chart(df).mark_line().encode(
    x=alt.X("quarter:T", title="Quarter"),
    y=alt.Y("inflation_rate:Q", title="Inflation Rate (%)"),
    tooltip=[alt.Tooltip("quarter:T"), alt.Tooltip("inflation_rate:Q", format=".2f")]
)
chart = gs_theme(chart, "Inflation Rate Over Time")
save_artifact(chart, "Inflation Rate Over Time")

Here is the line chart showing inflation rate over time from 2000 to 2024.

**Key observations:**
- Inflation started around 2% in early 2000 and remained relatively stable through the mid-2000s
- There was a notable spike during the 2008 financial crisis period
- Inflation dropped significantly after 2009, reaching lows around 1-2%
- A dramatic surge occurred starting in 2021, peaking above 9% in 2022
- Inflation has been declining since the 2022 peak, returning to around 3% by early 2024
